subcodes.title: Words spoken at Haifa Pilgrim House, 1920-10-26
subcodes.first_line: All the people are negligent, they are not thinking of pleasing God and spreading the word of God.
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @attaining good pleasure of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
